content.en:
The Death Flower Emperor was silent for a moment, and finally surrendered.

"Human, I would like to recognize you as Lord!"

The Death Flower Emperor said helplessly.

It is different from other flowers of death, other flowers of death are not afraid of death, but it has a high level of intelligence, it is very afraid of death, it does not want to fall and die.

Moreover, Ye Tian attracted it a little.

That is, Ye Tian can take it out of the Stygian Flower Realm, it is now at the limit of the true god level, but it has never been able to become a great god level, and its lifespan is difficult to increase.

If you can leave the Stygian Flower Realm, then you can impact the realm of the Great God Level, or even above the Great God Level.

In this way, its lifespan can be continuously improved.

Then, the Death Flower Emperor completed the ceremony of recognizing the lord, successfully recognized the lord Ye Tian, and became Ye Tian's plant pet.

"Master!"

After the Death Flower Emperor recognized the Lord, he saluted.

"I'm going to move you to my Chaos Ancient Realm, and I'll lift up this piece of land later, and you can cooperate with me, so that it will be easy to move to the Chaos Ancient Realm. "

Ye Tian admonished.

"Yes, master!"

The Death Flower Emperor replied.

Thundered!!!

The earth began to crack, and the area where the Death Flower Emperor was located began to fall apart under Ye Tian's power, and the Death Flower Emperor also cooperated with Ye Tian to gather his root system and tried to break away from this area.

Soon, a land resembling a floating island was suspended, and the Death Flower Emperor was among them.

Then, Ye Tian began to suck this floating island into the Chaos Ancient Realm.

Since the Death Flower Emperor did not resist, everything went well.

Not long after, the Death Flower Emperor entered Ye Tian's Chaos Ancient Realm with a large area of land around him, and integrated into the Chaos Ancient Realm, becoming a part of the Chaos Ancient Realm.

"Death Flower Emperor, what about the Death Flower Sea?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Master, the clansmen of the Death Flower Sea, let them stay in the Stygian Flower Realm, and let them disappear in the Stygian Flower Realm as the years go by. I will reproduce another batch of Death Flowers in the Chaos Ancient Realm. Death Flower Emperor said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The sea of death flowers is too big, and countless death flowers are rooted in this land, if they are collected into the Chaos Ancient Realm one by one, it will definitely waste a lot of time.

Besides, with the Death Flower Emperor, he didn't need to worry about the number of Death Flowers at all.

Once the Death Flower Emperor returns to the outside world, the cultivation will soon be able to break through to the Great God level, so it is not difficult for the Death Flower Emperor who cultivates at the Great God level to cultivate a large number of Death Flowers.

"Gone!"

Ye Tian flew out of the core area of the Death Flower Sea and came to the Death Flower Overseas.

Seeing Ye Tian come out, the Devouring Beast followed and asked, "Master, how is it?"

Ye Tiandao: "The harvest is great, it's time for us to leave the Stygian Flower Realm!"

"Yes!"

The Devourer nodded.

......

Soon after.

Ye Tian left the Stygian Flower Realm and returned to Danta.

Afterwards, Ye Tian handed over all the red sandalwood flowers and golden bone leaves he had collected to one of the persons in charge of Danta, and waited for Danta to refine the immortal golden pill.

According to the agreement, Ye Tian could obtain about 16 Immortal Golden Pills, plus one Immortal Golden Pill promised by Yun Dan Juggernaut, that was 17 Immortal Golden Pills.

With 17 Immortal Golden Pills, Ye Tian felt that it was enough.

It takes time to refine the Immortal Golden Pill, so Ye Tian will not stay in the Dan Tower, and let his guard, the Dark Master, contact the Dan Tower, once the Danta refines the Immortal Golden Pill, it can be handed over to the Dark Master.

Afterwards, Ye Tian returned to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

As soon as he came back, Ye Tian entered a state of retreat.

At this point, he took out some flower sap.

Through the communication with the Death Flower Emperor, Ye Tian finally knew the true name of these flower liquids - soul liquid!

Soul liquid is a magical substance condensed by the flower of death, when the soul liquid gathers more and more, you can condense a soul bead, this soul bead can help the flower of death improve its own cultivation and break the limit.

For example, ordinary Death Flowers can use Soul Orbs to break the limit and become Purple Death Flowers, and Purple Death Flowers can also be upgraded to Red Death Flowers through a large number of Soul Beads.

And the Red Flower of Death is also the Flower of Death that is closest to the Blood Red Flower of Death, but if you want to become a Red Flower of Death, it will take a long time, and it cannot be achieved with the lifespan of a true god-level Flower of Death.

Because of this, the sea of death flowers has not given birth to the red flower of death.

Soul liquid can refine the soul, but it has no such effect on the Flower of Death itself, and only has an effect on other creatures, which is also a very helpless thing for the Flower of Death.

"Try the effects of ordinary soul fluid!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He took a sip of ordinary soul liquid, and a stream of energy poured into the immortal soul and began to refine his immortal soul.

The immortal soul, which was almost at the limit of the god level, actually began to have the limit of improvement, and the immortal soul became stronger and stronger, and the speed of improvement was not slow.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian said in surprise.

If the immortal soul is strong, whether it is comprehension, cultivation speed, and some moves involving the soul, there will be a certain increase.

Moreover, the immortal soul is powerful, which is also helpful for breaking through the bottleneck.

In short, the fairy spirit is very important.

Ye Tian began to take a large amount of ordinary soul liquid, and in just a few months, he had consumed all the ordinary soul liquid, allowing the immortal soul to successfully increase by three times.

Three times doesn't seem like much, but Ye Tian's immortal soul is already much stronger than other god-level immortal souls, and it would be very exaggerated to triple it.

"Try the Purple Soul Liquid!"

Ye Tian took a sip of the purple soul liquid, and more powerful energy poured into his immortal soul, refining the immortal soul with a more terrifying effect.

"At least ten times the refining effect!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

Then, Ye Tian absorbed the purple soul liquid day by day to refine the immortal soul, but in the back, the immortal soul seemed to have reached a certain limit, and the difficulty of improving was getting bigger and bigger.

When the purple soul liquid was also consumed, Ye Tian checked it, and his immortal soul was about eight times stronger than before he didn't take the soul liquid.

An eightfold increase, which is already a terrifying increase!

"That's right, when the Death Flower Emperor cultivates to a higher level in the future, and cultivates more Death Flowers with a high cultivation, more and more soul liquids can be born, and the quality of those soul liquids will inevitably be better, when I cultivate to the true god level and the great god level, I can still use the soul liquid to increase the strength of the immortal soul!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

After the strength of the immortal soul increased by eight times, Ye Tian felt that his comprehension law and supernatural power effect had increased a lot, and the power of the soul attack had also skyrocketed many times, and the overall strength had also increased to a certain extent.

All in all, this time the harvest is big and big.

But the biggest one is the Death Flower Emperor, with the Death Flower Emperor, it will be difficult for Ye Tian to die in the future.

He took a look at the progress of the Death Flower Emperor, and now the Death Flower Emperor had successfully broken through to the Great God level, and cultivated a batch of Death Flowers, forming a small sea of Death Flowers in the Chaos Ancient Realm.

If it continues to develop at this rate, it won't be long before the Death Flower Sea can form a scale, and Ye Tian can also use the Death Flower Sea to transfer damage.

this day.

Ye Tian was in the process of cultivating, and the Dark Lord came with the news that the Danta had cultivated the first batch of Immortal Golden Pills, and he would be able to take his 17 Immortal Golden Pills in a few days.
